facts.file_npcs: {"Bandit":{"cap":1,"harm":1,"armor":"None","dice_pools":{"Melee":2,"Ranged":2},"special":"Cowardly – when outnumbered or after taking Harm, test Spirit (DV 3) or flee."},"Guard":{"cap":2,"harm":2,"armor":"Light","dice_pools":{"Melee":4,"Athletics":4},"special":"Patrol Training – +1 die to Notice when searching an area."},"Knight":{"cap":3,"harm":3,"armor":"Heavy","dice_pools":{"Melee":6,"Command":5},"special":"Challenge – once/scene, force an enemy to engage in melee (Resist with Spirit, DV 4). Mounted."},"Cultist":{"cap":1,"harm":1,"armor":"None","dice_pools":{"Arcana":4,"Deception":4},"special":"Ritual Chant – when three or more act together, they may perform a Low Rite as a group action."},"Bandit Leader":{"cap":3,"harm":3,"armor":"Medium","dice_pools":{"Melee":6,"Command":5},"special":"Rally – once/scene, restore 1 Morale to a nearby bandit. Dirty Fighting – may spend 1 Boon to impose –1 die on target's next defense."},"Lesser Spirit":{"cap":1,"harm":1,"armor":"None (incorporeal – half physical Harm)","dice_pools":{"Stealth":5,"Arcana":4},"special":"Incorporeal Movement – passes through small gaps. Sunlight Sensitivity – while in direct sunlight, –1 die to all actions."},"Greater Spirit":{"cap":3,"harm":3,"armor":"Heavy (or Light + immunity)","dice_pools":{"primary":7},"special":"Elemental Aura – creatures in Close suffer 1 Fatigue per round. Immutable – immune to poison and disease."},"Wraith":{"cap":2,"harm":2,"armor":"None (incorporeal)","dice_pools":{"Stealth":6,"Spirit+Resolve":6},"special":"Life Drain – on a successful touch attack, target marks 1 Fatigue and wraith clears 1 Fatigue."},"Wolf":{"cap":1,"harm":2,"armor":"None","dice_pools":{"Melee":5,"Athletics":5},"special":"Pack Tactics – when two or more wolves attack the same target, each gains +1 die. Blood Scent – +2 dice to track wounded prey."},"Dire Bear":{"cap":4,"harm":4,"armor":"Medium","dice_pools":{"Melee":8,"Endurance":8},"special":"Terrifying Roar – all in Near test Resolve (DV 4) or become Shaken. Maul – on a Critical Hit, target is knocked prone and suffers +1 Harm."}}
facts.file_patrons: {"The Traveler":{"theme":"Ways, Journeys, Safe Passage","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Road‑Sense","obligation":4,"effect":"+1 die to avoid ambushes/delays; create Path Memory timer."},{"name":"Traveler's Boon","obligation":5,"effect":"Ignore one level of difficult terrain or bureaucracy; share with ally."}],"standard":[{"name":"Waymark","obligation":8,"effect":"Declare a lane as permitted/easy; allies gain improved Position."}],"high":[{"name":"Crown of Crossings","obligation":13,"effect":"Allies +1 die to movement; pursuers –1 die; finish a travel timer segment free."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Wayfarer's Luck: reroll one failed travel roll per scene.","burden":"Restless Spirit: cannot stay in one place more than a week without marking Fatigue."}},"Oath of Flame & Light":{"theme":"Dawn, Vows, Protection, Smiting","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Kindle Vow","obligation":4,"effect":"Declare a vow; gain +1 die to actions fulfilling it."},{"name":"Lay on Hands","obligation":5,"effect":"Cleanse affliction, downgrade Harm, or remove Fatigue."}],"standard":[{"name":"Radiant Smite","obligation":9,"effect":"Next melee strike flares with dawnfire; +1 Effect or +1 Harm vs. oath‑breakers."}],"high":[{"name":"Covenant Blaze","obligation":13,"effect":"Halo allies; oath‑breakers suffer SB and Harm."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Oathbound Strength: +1 die when upholding vows.","burden":"Rigid Honor: must uphold vows even when disadvantageous; –1 die to flexible actions."}},"Inaea (Angel of the Spider)":{"theme":"Webs, Mercy, Connection, Patient Predation","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Hearth‑Thread Knot","obligation":5,"effect":"Bind two willing targets; both gain +1 die to Aid each other."},{"name":"Snaring Filament","obligation":5,"effect":"Lay an invisible snare; first hostile crossing suffers –2 dice."}],"standard":[{"name":"Strand of Inevitability","obligation":8,"effect":"Link two actors; force SB or gain +2 dice on Setup rolls."}],"high":[{"name":"Binding Knot","obligation":11,"effect":"Bind parties to a mutual oath; breaking inflicts 2 SB."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Web‑Sense: sense hidden ties (debts, rivalries) once/scene.","burden":"Empathic Overload: suffer 1 Fatigue when immersed in strong conflict."}},"The Witness":{"theme":"Truth, Memory, Revelation","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Lingering Trace","obligation":4,"effect":"+1 die to investigate a specific trace."},{"name":"Uncomfortable Question","obligation":5,"effect":"Force truth or mark Fatigue + Guilty Tell."}],"standard":[{"name":"Immutable Record","obligation":7,"effect":"Bind an agreement; breach causes SB and Oathbreaker's Mark."}],"high":[{"name":"Final Reckoning","obligation":13,"effect":"All present must speak a hidden truth; liars suffer Harm 2."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Truth's Sight: +1 die to detect deception.","burden":"Compulsive Honesty: must correct obvious falsehoods even when tactically disadvantageous."}},"Carrion King":{"theme":"Decay, Renewal, Patient Hunger","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Rot's Touch","obligation":4,"effect":"Cause a small object to decay (rope snaps, lock rusts)."},{"name":"Earthen Bed","obligation":5,"effect":"Rest as if a full day; clear 2 Fatigue."}],"standard":[{"name":"Carrion's Call","obligation":7,"effect":"Summon carrion insects; target suffers –1 die physical."}],"high":[{"name":"Harvest of the Dead","obligation":12,"effect":"Allies gain +2 dice and clear Fatigue; body crumbles."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Rot‑Sense: +1 die to notice decay, poison, hidden death.","burden":"Compost‑Stained: –1 die to social rolls with the fastidious."}},"Ikasha (She Who Sleeps)":{"theme":"Shadow, Secrets, Latent Potential, Thresholds","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Unlit Candle","obligation":6,"effect":"+1 die to Stealth/Subterfuge; declare a minor detail 'forgotten'."},{"name":"Crossroads Raven","obligation":5,"effect":"Reroll one failed navigation/pursuit roll or force enemy to lose minor action."}],"standard":[{"name":"Umbral Reservoir","obligation":8,"effect":"Clear 1 Fatigue or gain +2 dice on Stealth/Resolve."}],"high":[{"name":"Umbral Dream","obligation":14,"effect":"Shadow Form (intangible, +2 Stealth) or Hidden Path (bypass obstacle)."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Shadow's Whisper: +1 die to Deception when lying in darkness.","burden":"Truth Echoes: occasionally speak in riddles or half‑truths."}},"Grimmir (Old Man of the Forest)":{"theme":"Primal Mystery, Seasonal Sacrifice, Nature's Will","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Blood Offering","obligation":4,"effect":"+1 die to Survival/Stealth in natural terrain; ask one yes/no question about a hidden threat."},{"name":"Speaking Roots","obligation":5,"effect":"+2 dice to Investigation/Lore about a natural place."}],"standard":[{"name":"Twisted Path","obligation":7,"effect":"Target suffers –1 die to navigation/movement."}],"high":[{"name":"Cycle's Crown","obligation":14,"effect":"Become avatar of the season; gain seasonal bonuses and command plant life."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Seasonal Sense: +1 die to predict weather and natural events.","burden":"Cyclical Mood: –1 die to actions that defy the season."}},"Palinode (Queen of Encores)":{"theme":"Performance, Rapture, Unfinished Art","rites":{"low":[{"name":"Hymn Against Dread","obligation":4,"effect":"Allies gain +2 dice to resist Fear."},{"name":"Single True Note","obligation":5,"effect":"+2 dice to Performance for a scene; other rolls –1 die."}],"standard":[{"name":"Hooked Chorus","obligation":7,"effect":"Target must join or suffer –1 die social."}],"high":[{"name":"Crownpiece","obligation":14,"effect":"Create a transcendent masterpiece; +2 dice to creative rolls for session."}]},"corruption_bloom":{"benefit":"Perfect Pitch: +1 die to Performance.","burden":"Restless Ear: distracted by any flaw; –1 die to non‑performance focus."}}}
facts.file_spells: {"Light":{"tags":["ILLUMINATE"],"dv":2,"effect":"Create a small sustained light (torch‑brightness) for the scene.","notes":"No backlash risk; lasts until dismissed."},"Heal (Cantrip)":{"tags":["HEAL"],"dv":2,"effect":"Remove 1 Fatigue from yourself or a touched ally. Does not heal Harm.","notes":"Requires touch."},"Shield of Air":{"tags":["AIR","DEFEND"],"dv":3,"effect":"+1 die to next defense roll.","notes":"One use."},"Flame Cloak":{"tags":["FIRE","AREA","DEFEND"],"dv":4,"effect":"Enemies –1 die to approach; caster +1 to defense vs. melee.","notes":"Two actions; creates difficult terrain."},"Teleport (Self)":{"tags":["AIR","FOLD"],"dv":4,"effect":"Teleport self within Near range.","notes":"Dangerous tag (+2 DV). Leaves faint afterimage."},"Wall of Stone":{"tags":["EARTH","BARRIER","FORTIFY"],"dv":4,"effect":"Summon a 10‑foot stone wall. Provides cover; obstructs movement.","notes":"Scene duration; Integrity Timer 4."},"Heal Harm (with Purify)":{"tags":["HEAL","PURIFY"],"dv":5,"effect":"Restore 1 level of Harm (e.g., Harm 2 → 1).","notes":"Requires two actions; surcharge +2 DV. Also neutralises poison/disease."},"Fleet Step":{"tags":["AIR","HASTE","MOVE"],"dv":3,"effect":"Double movement speed for one exchange.","notes":"Requires open area."},"Sleep's Gentle Touch":{"tags":["WATER","DREAM","COMMAND"],"dv":4,"effect":"One target falls asleep (scene duration; Resist: Spirit+Resolve DV 2).","notes":"Harm wakes target. Dangerous if used in combat."},"Storm's Fury":{"tags":["AIR","STORM","AREA","FORCE"],"dv":6,"effect":"30‑foot storm cloud; lightning strikes random targets (Harm 2).","notes":"Scene duration; reduces visibility. Dangerous tag (+2 DV)."},"Earth's Tremor":{"tags":["EARTH","QUAKE","AREA"],"dv":5,"effect":"20‑foot tremor; enemies test Body+Athletics (DV 3) or fall prone.","notes":"Destabilises structures; affects all in area."}}
